forbidden_text: Find posted meetings without needing to understand clerk workflows.
in_app_browser.result: The /staff product route opened the React staff dashboard instead of the resident Public Posting portal.

accessibility.keyboard: The direct /staff route preserves the dashboard's existing keyboard-reachable navigation, workspace buttons, and focus-visible styling.
accessibility.copy_review: Route copy remains staff-oriented and exposes the Meeting Runbook as the clerk's first next-action surface.
accessibility.viewport: Desktop route capture rendered the dashboard without SPA fallback or public-portal leakage.
